title: Ace Gives Luffy the Paper
description: On pages 3–5, this part focuses on ace gives luffy the paper, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: Ace Gives Luffy the Paper. The crew moves across Alabasta as Vivi explains the rebellion, Crocodile’s manipulation, and the need to stop the civil war. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What did your brother exactly give you?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Not sure, I think it's just a piece of paper.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Huh, you're right. There's nothing even written on it.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What's it for?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Pummo but since Ace told me to hang onto it,

dialogue.speaker: Ace
dialogue.text: That's what I'll do!

dialogue.speaker: Ace
dialogue.text: Alright, I'll sew it in underneath the ribbon here...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: So sew it in there tight!

dialogue.speaker: Ace
dialogue.text: Here.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Oh!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Thanks, Nami! It should be safe here!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Now I won't need to worry about losing it!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: What, you worry?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Luffy, change into this.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Huh? But why? It's hot outside.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: You have to because it's so hot outside. The temperatures here can reach over 50 degrees.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: If you don't, you'll get sunburnt all over.

dialogue.speaker: Ace
dialogue.text: Then why're you two wearing sleeveless stuff?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: We're going to be wearing additional clothing on top of this.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: What! You are!?

dialogue.speaker: Ace
dialogue.text: Oh fine. Guess I don't have a choice.

dialogue.speaker: Ace
dialogue.text: Ahh! I think we're going the wrong way. We're heading away from the tip of the island.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Actually, this isn't the tip of the island. It's actually the mouth of the Sandra River.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You can see how the island coast continues on over on that side of the river.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Oh, you're right.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Look.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: To Alubarma

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: This is a rough map of the region here I sketched just now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Base of the Rebels, Yuba Oasis

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Present Location

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Yuba Oasis

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Our destination is here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: We'll exit from the mouth of Sandra River and then head inland!

dialogue.speaker: Ace
dialogue.text: And I just have to kick his ass, right!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Nooo!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'm going to stop the rebels through words. I don't want any more unnecessary bloodsheh...!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: But there's 700,000 of these rebels. You really think they'll just stop?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Well...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'll find out the answer to that along our journey to Yuba,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: As I determine the extent to which Baroque Works,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Has deceived and corrupted the citizens of Alabasta...!

summary: This part highlights ace gives luffy the paper and moves the chapter forward through its central emotional or plot turn.
